iterations.annotation: POST-HOC INTEGRITY ANNOTATION (2026-06-12): this acceptance is reclassified as EXPLORATORY, not the validated-fix KPI. Defects in the run: (1) baseline graph i03 came from a previously reverted broken tree; (2) finding id F-003 on that graph denoted the triage-REJECTED package-facade god node, not the validated core god module — id drift in the handover; (3) graph_diff._top_score read the rank-1 entry (score 0) instead of the max, fabricating 'goal reached'; (4) the accepted change was never committed on its branch. Honest re-evaluation vs clean i02: echo bottleneck 0.4965 -> 0.4185 (-15.7%), tests green (1672) — real but below-threshold, on a non-authorized target. Patch archived in results/patches/. All four defects fixed before the authorized re-run.
iterations.strategy: extract a cohesive group of helpers into a new module

note: iteration 4 reclassified exploratory — see its annotation
